title: Wizard of the Crow
author: Ngũgĩ wa Thiong'o
description: A landmark of postcolonial African literature, Wizard of the Crow is an ambitious, magisterial, comic novel from the acclaimed Kenyan novelist, playwright, poet, and critic. “Wizard of the Crow is first and foremost a great, spellbinding tale, probably the crowning glory of Ngugi’s life’s work. . . . He has turned the power of storytelling into a weapon against totalitarianism.” —The Washington Post Book World Set in the fictional Free Republic of Aburiria, Wizard of the Crow dramatizes with cor...
